steps.title: Find the timing note
steps.content: The student wants to specify when Euramerica formed. The relevant note directly says that Euramerica formed about 300 million years ago.

steps.title: Reject broader facts
steps.content: Choice B explains the supercontinent cycle but does not give Euramerica's date. Choice C defines Euramerica as a supercontinent. Choice D names Euramerica and Kenorland generally but does not specify when Euramerica formed. The sentence with the 300-million-year date matches the goal. The answer is A.
